name: batch_grep
description: Search multiple patterns in files with file type filtering, directory exclusion, line exclusion, context, and head limit.

parameters.name: --include=GLOB
parameters.description: File name glob filter (repeatable, OR logic)

parameters.name: --exclude-name=GLOB
parameters.description: Exclude file names matching glob (repeatable, e.g. *_test.go)

parameters.name: --exclude-pattern=PAT
parameters.description: Exclude lines matching pattern (repeatable, like grep -v)

parameters.name: --count|-c
parameters.description: Count matching lines per file (like grep -c)

parameters.name: --context=N|-C=N
parameters.description: Show N lines of context around matches

examples.expected: First 20 lines matching TODO or FIXME in .tsx and .ts files, excluding node_modules

cost_saving_rationale: Combines all patterns into a single grep call and avoids multi-step grep | grep -v | head pipelines, saving 3+ steps per search.
